context_text: <A> i mean it was i mean i went to ah the i went to a um an episcopal school like middle school / <B> mhm / <A> and my mom worked the episcopal church that was right next door / <B> mhm / <A> so if i got in trouble you know the teachers just walked right next door and you know were like hey your son your son's acting up and of course i got in trouble / <B> mhm / <A> so i mean i didn't get away with much then but then once once i hit high school you know my my parents they were pretty they were like okay you know you're going to go to college in four years so we're going to let you you know just make sure you don't mess up on your own / <B> right / <A> and you'll be ready for college so really like yeah once i hit high school they backed off and they weren't they never really hounded me about homework or you know anything real hard core like that / <B> right
